---
type: observation
genitor: "[[observations]]"
date: 2026-11-08
season: autumn
source: "logbook-source/2026-03-14.md### 16:40 Winter prep review"
supports:
  - "[[Mulch after the first hard freeze, not before]]"
---
Beds mulched while the ground was still warm held that warmth and kept the trees growing
into the cold. Beds mulched after the ground had frozen came through with markedly less
loss, which inverts the intuition that earlier protection is better protection.
